examples: But it is an inspired journey, with barely a skippable track.
Unless you work in advertising or are a close student of state liquor monopolies, much of the detail will be skippable.
With commercials skippable on TV and ads blockable on the internet, it can be hard to break through to tech-loaded consumers these days.
On desktop and laptop computers, some 65% of YouTube ads run inside videos are now skippable, but YouTube says only 10% of people always skip them.
